name: Eden: Untamed Planet
overview: Explore six of the last untouched locations on earth. The documentary series presents life as nature intended, following the unique way wildlife has adapted to these environments and continues to rise to new challenges over the course of a year.

trailers.title: ‘Eden: Untamed Planet’ Trailer: Life as Nature Intended It 🌱 Premieres July 24 on BBC America & AMC
